ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's methodology */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last synchronized */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "access_credentials" TEXT /* Access credentials needed to fetch data (e.g., API keys) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, data scientist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training data record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the data was used for */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value recorded on that date */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the training data */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the data was validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast the prediction is associated with */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value output from the model */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast the report is based on */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing forecasts and insights */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the report was shared with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the forecast */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being collaborated on */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
